title: Paris New-York
director: Yves Mirande, Claude Heymann, Georges Lacombe
actors: Gaby Morlay, Michel Simon, André Lefaur, Claude Dauphin
plot: Passengers on the luxury ship Normandie, headed from France to see the New York City World's Fair, include: two crooks, an American banker and his daughter,and two police officials.En route a valuable diamond goes missing.
